days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Possible thunderstorms at first. Force 2 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 2 to 4 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Showers will become more frequent later.A few thunderstorms later. Force 3 to 5 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 4 to 6 southeasterly winds with gusts.
